# Media 360 Concept

> Media 360 Concept is a premium branding, advertising, and creative agency
> headquartered at Business Park, Calicut (Kozhikode), Kerala, India. The team
> brings 17+ years of experience in Saudi Arabia (KSA), 12+ years across India,
> and 8+ years in the USA, serving clients in Kerala, wider India, KSA, the UAE,
> and international markets.

## What we do

- Branding & identity design: logo design, visual identity, brand guidelines, rebranding
- Brand strategy & market research: positioning, naming, competitor analysis
- Advertising & media buying: campaign planning, outdoor, print, broadcast, digital placement
- Media production: video production, motion graphics, 3D design, brand films
- Digital marketing: SEO, social media management, performance marketing, Google Ads
- Events & brand activation: launches, exhibitions, on-ground experiences
- Web development: fast, SEO-optimised websites and landing pages
- App development: iOS, Android, and cross-platform apps
- UI/UX & Figma design: wireframes, prototypes, design systems
- AI & automation: WhatsApp automation, chatbots, AI workflows
- Systems & cloud: CRM, ERP, cloud infrastructure, consulting

## Deliverables

Logos, brand guidelines, packaging design, labels, brochures, catalogues,
booklets, flyers, business cards, restaurant menus, signage, vehicle branding,
banners, stickers, T-shirt and mug printing, websites, mobile apps, videos,
3D renders, and motion graphics.

## Industries served

Restaurants, healthcare/hospitals, education/schools, real estate, retail,
hospitality/hotels, startups, construction, manufacturing, luxury brands,
travel, and corporate companies.
